title: MCSM Musicpack x PvP Music
description: Minecraft Story Mode Battle music for PvP Music mod (Contains 8 songs) Credits to Antimo & Welles for all the songs. Needs PvP Music mod to work
body:
# You need this mod for this to work: https://modrinth.com/mod/pvp-music

contains 8 battle songs from minecraft story mode. all credits go to Antimo & Welles.

* Contains the following songs: Action Suspense, Gold Protocol, Ivor Fight, Ninja Fight, PAMA, Sports Finale, Showdown in Skyland, Survival.
